utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 named sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides a description and a cost (€330/month); it explicitly mentions physical and mental health insurance—fully specified. (2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan states it does not include a standalone home/contents policy; instead, some travel component covers adventure equipment while traveling. This does not satisfy a home/contents insurance policy; although a cost is given (€0/month), it fails the requirement of having home/contents insurance. So not fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Provided description and cost (€195/month)—fully specified. (4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided description and cost (€75/month)—fully specified. (5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided monthly and annual totals (€600 and €7200)—fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan mentions: PrimeCare Premium Package for health (maps to Primary Health Coverage > physical_health > PrimeCare Premium Plan), PrimeTravel Premium Plan with Adventure Travel Coverage add-on (maps to Mobility Coverage > travel_insurance > PrimeTravel Premium Plan and Travel Enhancement Services > Adventure Travel Coverage), and Premium Medical Network add-on (maps to Travel Enhancement Services > Premium Medical Network). No standalone home/contents policy selected.
